source_note: Connecticut PURA Final Decision, Docket No. 20-08-03 — Investigation into the Electric Distribution Companies' (The Connecticut Light and Power Company d/b/a Eversource Energy and The United Illuminating Company) Preparation for and Response to Tropical Storm Isaias, resulting in civil penalties and management directives for inadequate emergency response (139 pp).
